history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person stands outdoors at night beside a wall with a purple-tinted panel while a white subtitle box with Indonesian text overlays the image.

Main Subject:
A person with short dark hair stands facing the camera, holding one hand near the front of their body and the other hand resting by their side. They wear a dark long-sleeve top and loose dark pants, with bare feet. To the right side of the frame, a large wall surface with a gray texture is visible, including a lighter purple area near the right edge.

Setting:
The scene is outdoors at night under artificial light. Behind the person are small buildings with light-colored walls, fences, and a gate-like structure. A large green plant stands behind them near the left-center background. The ground appears uneven and includes grass and small rocks. A canopy or covered area with bright lighting is visible in the background on the right.

Visual Details:
The camera angle is slightly low and close to the subject, with the person centered in the foreground. Lighting is bright on the right side from the background, creating strong contrast and shadows across the person’s face and clothing. The person’s top appears plain and dark, and their pants are dark with a relaxed fit. The wall on the right has a mottled gray texture, and the purple portion appears as a light overlay or tinted surface. The subtitle box covers part of the person’s upper body.

Visible Text:
hantu emg seram,tapi lebih👋
seram lagi manusia yang udah
dibantuin malah lupa diri

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person standing outside at night near a textured wall while being lit by bright background lights. Text in a white box overlays the scene with Indonesian wording.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
